title: Capability Canon
summary: Capability docs define what each command means doctrinally. These are not shell help pages. They are the canonical operating manuals for each capability. Seeded capabilities in thi
content:
Capability docs define what each command means doctrinally.

These are not shell help pages.
They are the canonical operating manuals for each capability.

Seeded capabilities in this repo:

- ship
- review
- verify
- handoff
- security
- infra

More capabilities will be added as the runtime grows.
